title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 392.180 - What definitions to apply
text:
392.180.  What definitions to apply. — The provisions of section 386.020, defining words, phrases and terms, shall apply to and determine the meaning of all such words, phrases and terms as used in sections 392.190 to 392.530.
(1949 H.B. 2104, A.L. 1996 S.B. 507)
